wafv2.rulegroup.headermatchpattern.CfnAb:
The filter to use to identify the subset of headers to inspect in a web request. 

You must specify exactly one setting: either `All`, `IncludedHeaders`, or `ExcludedHeaders`.

Example JSON: `"MatchPattern": { "ExcludedHeaders": [ "KeyToExclude1", "KeyToExclude2" ] }`

wafv2.rulegroup.headermatchpattern.Exclu.Description: Inspect only the headers whose keys don't match any of the strings specified here.

wafv2.rulegroup.headermatchpattern.Inclu.Description: Inspect only the headers that have a key that matches one of the strings specified here.
